# @x-oasis/env

Detect DOM environment information

## Installation

```bash
npm install @x-oasis/env
```

## Quick Start

```typescript
import { /* exports */ } from '@x-oasis/env';

// Your code here
```

## Key Features

- High performance
- TypeScript support
- No external dependencies
- Well-tested and stable
